positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a group of forest creatures—a leaping deer, a mischievous fox, a wise owl, and playful rabbits—interact in a stylized clearing. The scene should be rendered in a clean, high-contrast, linework style with bold areas of flat color and a graphic novel aesthetic. Use deep emerald green, sapphire blue, burnt orange, and creamy off-white as the primary palette. Focus on strong, readable silhouettes and dynamic, circular composition perfect for a t-shirt print. The lighting should be dramatic, emphasizing the outlines and depth of the figures against a stylized, simplified forest background. Detailed linework, clean vector style, highly decorative, suitable for commercial print.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, lowres, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor composition, photorealistic, gradient, hyperdetailed, messy, solid background, logos, trademarks, celebrity likenesses, copyrighted characters, art deco, graffiti
